notes: RIVER FOREST RANCH -- zip 77471 (Rosenberg, Fort Bend County). Preliminary plat dated October 27, 2025 filed with City of Rosenberg. Owner identified as River Forest, Ltd., a Texas limited partnership, address 5545 F.M. 359 Road, Richmond TX 77406. Plat surveyed by Pedraza Surveying LLC (dba Tejas Surveying) of Richmond TX. Small 7.561-acre, 2-lot residential subdivision.
